{{Quote|Look out for Teraud; he's a megalomaniac, and he thinks he can topple the Emperor...|[[Dirk Maggin]] to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Bors Teraud''' was the commanding officer of operations at the top-secret Imperial research facility known as the [[The Warren (Dantooine)|Warren]]. Stories told that Teraud, together with a [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]], tried to build an army of cyborgs and overthrow [[Palpatine/Legends|the Emperor]]. The attempt failed, due to the scientist turning some of the cyborgs upon him. Teraud ended his life as a madman, in his own facility.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Bors Teraud appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TW">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|The Warren|Dantooine}}</ref> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Bors Teraud was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 3 Notes: 8 October 03|Publish 3]]," released on [[October 8]], 2003.<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 3: The Warren">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60890|text=Publish 3: The Warren}}</ref>
